actions.script:
import org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityFindImpl import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityFindBuilder import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityDefinition import org.moqui.impl.entity.FieldInfo import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityJavaUtil.FieldOrderOptions import org.moqui.impl.entity.condition.EntityConditionImplBase
def find = ec.entity.find("mantle.party.Person") def dv = find.makeEntityDynamicView() dv.addMemberEntity("PER", "mantle.party.Person", null, null, null) dv.addMemberEntity("PR", "mantle.party.PartyRole", "PER", false, ["partyId":"partyId"]) dv.addAlias("PER", "partyId") dv.addAlias("PER", "firstName") dv.addAlias("PER", "lastName") dv.addAlias("PER", "createdStamp") dv.addAlias("PR", "roleTypeId")
find.condition("roleTypeId", "CUSTOMER") // parseTimestamp was needed here, plain string wasnt working find.condition("createdStamp", EntityCondition.GREATER_THAN_EQUAL_TO, ec.l10n.parseTimestamp("2023-06-01 00:00:00", "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")) find.condition("createdStamp", EntityCondition.LESS_THAN_EQUAL_TO, ec.l10n.parseTimestamp("2023-06-30 23:59:59", "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"))
EntityFindImpl findImpl = (EntityFindImpl) find EntityDefinition ed = findImpl.getEntityDef() EntityConditionImplBase whereCondition = (EntityConditionImplBase) findImpl.getWhereEntityCondition() List<String> fieldsToSelect = findImpl.getSelectFields() int ftsSize = fieldsToSelect != null ? fieldsToSelect.size() : 0 FieldInfo[] fieldInfoArray FieldOrderOptions[] fieldOptionsArray = (FieldOrderOptions[]) null if (ftsSize == 0) { fieldInfoArray = ed.entityInfo.allFieldInfoArray } else { fieldInfoArray = new FieldInfo[ftsSize] fieldOptionsArray = new FieldOrderOptions[ftsSize] for (int i = 0; i < ftsSize; i++) { String fieldName = fieldsToSelect.get(i) FieldInfo fi = ed.getFieldInfo(fieldName) if (fi == null) { FieldOrderOptions foo = new FieldOrderOptions(fieldName) fi = ed.getFieldInfo(foo.fieldName) fieldInfoArray[i] = fi fieldOptionsArray[i] = foo } else { fieldInfoArray[i] = fi } } }
EntityFindBuilder efb = new EntityFindBuilder(ed, findImpl, whereCondition, fieldInfoArray) if (findImpl.getDistinct()) efb.makeDistinct() efb.makeSqlSelectFields(fieldInfoArray, fieldOptionsArray, "true".equals(findImpl.efi.getDatabaseNode(ed.groupName).attribute("add-unique-as"))) efb.makeSqlFromClause() efb.makeWhereClause() efb.makeGroupByClause() efb.makeHavingClause((EntityConditionImplBase) findImpl.getHavingEntityCondition()) boolean hasLimitOffset = findImpl.getLimit() != null || findImpl.getOffset() != null ArrayList<String> orderByExpanded = new ArrayList() if (findImpl.getOrderBy() != null) orderByExpanded.addAll(findImpl.getOrderBy()) efb.makeOrderByClause(orderByExpanded, hasLimitOffset) if (hasLimitOffset) efb.addLimitOffset(findImpl.getLimit(), findImpl.getOffset()) if (findImpl.getForUpdate()) efb.makeForUpdate()
renderedSql = efb.sqlTopLevel.toString() parametersList = [] for (int i = 0; i < efb.parameters.size(); i++) { parametersList.add(efb.parameters.get(i).value) }
logger.info("PRE-EXECUTION RENDERED SQL: " + renderedSql) logger.info("PRE-EXECUTION PARAMETERS: " + parametersList)
resultList = find.list() println "Q1 done, rows: " + resultList.size()

import org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityFindImpl import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityFindBuilder import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityDefinition import org.moqui.impl.entity.FieldInfo import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityJavaUtil.FieldOrderOptions import org.moqui.impl.entity.condition.EntityConditionImplBase
def find = ec.entity.find("mantle.product.Product") def dv = find.makeEntityDynamicView() dv.addMemberEntity("P", "mantle.product.Product", null, null, null) dv.addMemberEntity("PT", "mantle.product.ProductType", "P", false, ["productTypeId":"productTypeId"]) dv.addAlias("P", "productId") dv.addAlias("P", "productTypeId") dv.addAlias("P", "internalName") dv.addAlias("PT", "isPhysical")
find.condition("isPhysical", "Y")
EntityFindImpl findImpl = (EntityFindImpl) find EntityDefinition ed = findImpl.getEntityDef() EntityConditionImplBase whereCondition = (EntityConditionImplBase) findImpl.getWhereEntityCondition() List<String> fieldsToSelect = findImpl.getSelectFields() int ftsSize = fieldsToSelect != null ? fieldsToSelect.size() : 0 FieldInfo[] fieldInfoArray FieldOrderOptions[] fieldOptionsArray = (FieldOrderOptions[]) null if (ftsSize == 0) { fieldInfoArray = ed.entityInfo.allFieldInfoArray } else { fieldInfoArray = new FieldInfo[ftsSize] fieldOptionsArray = new FieldOrderOptions[ftsSize] for (int i = 0; i < ftsSize; i++) { String fieldName = fieldsToSelect.get(i) FieldInfo fi = ed.getFieldInfo(fieldName) if (fi == null) { FieldOrderOptions foo = new FieldOrderOptions(fieldName) fi = ed.getFieldInfo(foo.fieldName) fieldInfoArray[i] = fi fieldOptionsArray[i] = foo } else { fieldInfoArray[i] = fi } } }
EntityFindBuilder efb = new EntityFindBuilder(ed, findImpl, whereCondition, fieldInfoArray) if (findImpl.getDistinct()) efb.makeDistinct() efb.makeSqlSelectFields(fieldInfoArray, fieldOptionsArray, "true".equals(findImpl.efi.getDatabaseNode(ed.groupName).attribute("add-unique-as"))) efb.makeSqlFromClause() efb.makeWhereClause() efb.makeGroupByClause() efb.makeHavingClause((EntityConditionImplBase) findImpl.getHavingEntityCondition()) boolean hasLimitOffset = findImpl.getLimit() != null || findImpl.getOffset() != null ArrayList<String> orderByExpanded = new ArrayList() if (findImpl.getOrderBy() != null) orderByExpanded.addAll(findImpl.getOrderBy()) efb.makeOrderByClause(orderByExpanded, hasLimitOffset) if (hasLimitOffset) efb.addLimitOffset(findImpl.getLimit(), findImpl.getOffset()) if (findImpl.getForUpdate()) efb.makeForUpdate()
renderedSql = efb.sqlTopLevel.toString() parametersList = [] for (int i = 0; i < efb.parameters.size(); i++) { parametersList.add(efb.parameters.get(i).value) }
logger.info("PRE-EXECUTION RENDERED SQL: " + renderedSql) logger.info("PRE-EXECUTION PARAMETERS: " + parametersList)
resultList = find.list()

import org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityFindImpl import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityFindBuilder import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityDefinition import org.moqui.impl.entity.FieldInfo import org.moqui.impl.entity.EntityJavaUtil.FieldOrderOptions import org.moqui.impl.entity.condition.EntityConditionImplBase
def find = ec.entity.find("mantle.product.Product") def dv = find.makeEntityDynamicView() dv.addMemberEntity("P", "mantle.product.Product", null, null, null) // left join so products without any ERP_ID row still come through, then we check IS NULL dv.addMemberEntity("GI", "mantle.product.feature.GoodIdentification", "P", true, ["productId":"productId"], [["field-name":"goodIdentificationTypeId", "value":"ERP_ID"]], null)
dv.addAlias("P", "productId") dv.addAlias("P", "internalName") dv.addAlias("P", "productTypeId") dv.addAlias("GI", "idValue")
find.condition("idValue", EntityCondition.IS_NULL, null)
EntityFindImpl findImpl = (EntityFindImpl) find EntityDefinition ed = findImpl.getEntityDef() EntityConditionImplBase whereCondition = (EntityConditionImplBase) findImpl.getWhereEntityCondition() List<String> fieldsToSelect = findImpl.getSelectFields() int ftsSize = fieldsToSelect != null ? fieldsToSelect.size() : 0 FieldInfo[] fieldInfoArray FieldOrderOptions[] fieldOptionsArray = (FieldOrderOptions[]) null if (ftsSize == 0) { fieldInfoArray = ed.entityInfo.allFieldInfoArray } else { fieldInfoArray = new FieldInfo[ftsSize] fieldOptionsArray = new FieldOrderOptions[ftsSize] for (int i = 0; i < ftsSize; i++) { String fieldName = fieldsToSelect.get(i) FieldInfo fi = ed.getFieldInfo(fieldName) if (fi == null) { FieldOrderOptions foo = new FieldOrderOptions(fieldName) fi = ed.getFieldInfo(foo.fieldName) fieldInfoArray[i] = fi fieldOptionsArray[i] = foo } else { fieldInfoArray[i] = fi } } }
EntityFindBuilder efb = new EntityFindBuilder(ed, findImpl, whereCondition, fieldInfoArray) if (findImpl.getDistinct()) efb.makeDistinct() efb.makeSqlSelectFields(fieldInfoArray, fieldOptionsArray, "true".equals(findImpl.efi.getDatabaseNode(ed.groupName).attribute("add-unique-as"))) efb.makeSqlFromClause() efb.makeWhereClause() efb.makeGroupByClause() efb.makeHavingClause((EntityConditionImplBase) findImpl.getHavingEntityCondition()) boolean hasLimitOffset = findImpl.getLimit() != null || findImpl.getOffset() != null ArrayList<String> orderByExpanded = new ArrayList() if (findImpl.getOrderBy() != null) orderByExpanded.addAll(findImpl.getOrderBy()) efb.makeOrderByClause(orderByExpanded, hasLimitOffset) if (hasLimitOffset) efb.addLimitOffset(findImpl.getLimit(), findImpl.getOffset()) if (findImpl.getForUpdate()) efb.makeForUpdate()
renderedSql = efb.sqlTopLevel.toString() parametersList = [] for (int i = 0; i < efb.parameters.size(); i++) { parametersList.add(efb.parameters.get(i).value) }
logger.info("PRE-EXECUTION RENDERED SQL: " + renderedSql) logger.info("PRE-EXECUTION PARAMETERS: " + parametersList)
resultList = find.list() println "Q3 missing netsuite id count: " + resultList.size()
